hasFriend.description: hasCloseFriend rdfs:subPropertyOf hasFriend; both are symmetric. Asserted adam hasCloseFriend re and azura hasFriend hathor.

hasCloseFriend.description: adam hasCloseFriend re (asserted); hasCloseFriend is SymmetricProperty → re hasCloseFriend adam inferred. hasCloseFriend ⊆ hasFriend but NOT the reverse: azura hasFriend hathor does NOT produce hasCloseFriend.

neg-closefriend-not-promoted.description: azura hasFriend hathor (asserted at hasFriend level only). The sub-property hierarchy runs downward only: hasCloseFriend ⊆ hasFriend, never the reverse. azura must NOT have hasCloseFriend hathor.
